name: player_pff_meets_snap_minimum range year_offset reduces with BOOL_OR (not SUM)
description: meets_snap_minimum is boolean; SUM(boolean) errors. A range year_offset reduces with BOOL_OR -- met the snap minimum in ANY in-window season.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT BOOL_OR(pff_player_seasonlogs.meets_snap_minimum) FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pff_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND pff_player_seasonlogs.season_year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_meets_snap_minimum_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
